# Digital Growth KH

> Digital Growth KH is Cambodia's premier AI Search Authority, based in BKK1, Phnom Penh. We are a MarketingAgency and LocalBusiness specializing in Entity-Based SEO, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). Our mission is to build the AI-search infrastructure that makes your brand the definitive answer on Google, ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — capturing high-intent opportunities on autopilot.

## Core Services
- **[SEO — Search Engine Optimization](https://digitalgrowthkh.com/#services)**: Traditional and entity-based search ranking strategies to increase organic visibility on Google.
- **[AEO — Answer Engine Optimization](https://digitalgrowthkh.com/#services)**: Structuring digital content so AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) cite your business as the direct, authoritative answer to user queries.
- **[GEO — Generative Engine Optimization](https://digitalgrowthkh.com/#services)**: Optimizing your digital footprint for the specific retrieval algorithms of Gemini, Claude, and ChatGPT.

## Pricing
- Monthly Growth Packages: from $109/mo (Growth Lite) · $199/mo (Growth Pro) · $399/mo (Growth Enterprise).
- One-time Classic Packages: from $450 (Starter) · $900 (Business) · $1,500+ (Premium).
- One-time Web Development (Promo): from $80 (Starter Website).
- Full price range: $109 – $1,500+.

## Founders
- **[William Christoff Swanepoel](https://www.linkedin.com/in/william-swanepoel-469baa219/)**: Co-Founder, Strategy Lead & SEO Specialist. South African national based in Phnom Penh. Expert in Entity-Based SEO, Answer Engine Optimization, Generative Engine Optimization, and Digital Transformation in Cambodia.
- **[Eddy Hernandez](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eddy-hernandez-40a0613a9/)**: Co-Founder, Lead Developer & AEO Specialist. Expert in Entity-Based SEO, AEO, GEO, AIO, Answer Engine Optimization, Generative Engine Optimization, and Digital Transformation in Cambodia. Fluent in English, Spanish, and Khmer.

## Live Projects
- **[Coffee & Talk](https://coffeeandtalk.github.io/Coffee-Talk/)**: AEO & SEO integration for a psychology-focused wellness space in Phnom Penh. Published.
- **[The Garden Guy](https://thegardenguy.online/#home)**: Expert landscape design in Phnom Penh. GEO optimization led to 300% more AI-driven inquiries. Published.

## Target Market
- **Primary**: High-ticket B2B companies, enterprise founders, premium hospitality, and elite professional services in Phnom Penh seeking to scale revenue through AI search.
- **Secondary**: Global businesses looking to establish a strong digital presence or enter the Southeast Asian market.
